name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use CryptoWatch:

• Tap 📊 Watchlist to see your coins
• Tap ➕ Add Coin to track a new crypto
• Tap 🔍 Price to check live prices
• Tap 🔔 Set Alert to get notified on price moves

Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
